site.tagline: Three Crystals. Three Races. One Prophecy.
site.hero_intro: A completed epic fantasy trilogy of ancient evil, war, unlikely heroes and a darkness awakening after three thousand years.
site.start_intro: Start with Book One and follow the completed journey through Maelstrom and Dragon Knight.
site.world_heading: A World on the Edge of Darkness
site.world_intro: Three crystals once sealed an ancient prison. Now the world has forgotten, the kingdoms turn against one another, and the Prince of Shade stirs in the shadows.

crystals.blue_text: Blue belongs to the Humans, who originally came to these lands from the sea.
crystals.green_text: Green belongs to the Dwarves, in recognition of their woodland home.
crystals.red_text: Red belongs to the Faerkine and their ancient connection to the fabled, long-lost magics of the Elders, also known as the Old Ones, the original bringers of magic to the world.

wyvern.title: Wyvern
wyvern.description: A mother flees through snow-covered mountains while the man she loves buys her time with his life. A child is born into a war that has already begun. Three thousand years after an ancient evil was sealed away, the crystals are found again and the Prince of Shade begins to stir.
wyvern.tagline: Save a princess. Win a lost war. Defeat Evil. Stay alive.
wyvern.subtitle: Book One

maelstrom.title: Maelstrom
maelstrom.description: The struggle widens beyond the familiar kingdoms. The Great Maelstrom and the dangers beyond the Roaring Shallows reveal the true scale of the conflict.
maelstrom.subtitle: Book Two

dragon_knight.title: Dragon Knight
dragon_knight.description: The final battle brings heroes, enemies, prophecy and ancient power together in the concluding volume of the completed trilogy.
dragon_knight.subtitle: Book Three

characters.name: Brinn Thronso
characters.description: An unlikely figure drawn towards a destiny far greater and more dangerous than the life he expected.

characters.name: Princess Megan
characters.description: A princess caught between duty, war and the possibility of uniting a shattered world.

characters.name: Ben Preem
characters.description: A frontline officer fighting the invading Horde. His story follows the war itself and reveals its progress through the eyes of a soldier caught at its centre.

characters.name: Ultor Halfbreed
characters.description: A formidable presence in a world divided by old hatreds, divided races and ancient secrets.

characters.name: Helfwen and Anabel
characters.description: Key figures whose loyalties, histories and actions contribute to the trilogy's expanding conflict.

characters.name: The Prince of Shade
characters.description: A shadow gathering behind war and prophecy, tied to the evil imprisoned three thousand years before.

timeline.title: The Ancient War
timeline.description: Three races stood together against a great evil.

timeline.title: The Three Crystals
timeline.description: The crystals seal the prison and preserve the world from the darkness within.

timeline.title: The World Forgets
timeline.description: Old alliances fade, kingdoms divide, and prophecy becomes legend.

timeline.title: Wyvern
timeline.description: The crystals are found again. War spreads and the Prince of Shade stirs.

timeline.title: Maelstrom
timeline.description: The conflict moves into a wider and more dangerous world.

timeline.title: Dragon Knight
timeline.description: The prophecy, the races and the ancient enemy converge in the final struggle.

reviews.quote: A classic trilogy in the making.
A compelling narrative filled with tension and intrigue... richly imagined and immersive.
I couldn’t put it down... finished in two days.
Full of likable characters and believable villains... highly compelling.

about.heading: About D.J. O’Brien
paragraphs: D.J. O’Brien is an Irish fantasy author and the creator of the completed Dark Lair Trilogy.
His fiction combines ancient prophecy, war, unlikely heroes, divided kingdoms and the return of a darkness believed defeated three thousand years ago.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: Use this secure form for review, interview, media and publishing enquiries.

news.title: The Official Home of The Dark Lair Trilogy
news.text: The official website brings together the complete trilogy, original maps, character introductions, reviews and promotional videos in one place.

news.title: The Trilogy Is Complete
news.text: Readers can begin with Wyvern, continue through Maelstrom, and conclude the journey with Dragon Knight.

news.title: Explore the Maps
news.text: The regional map from Wyvern and the expanded world map from books two and three are available in the Cartographer's Atlas.
